post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 163: Terraria Mafia
Credits to summitwei and whoever he credited for the rule template.

Please read all the rules, especially if this is your first game.
(do not post if you are not listed in the alive section of this game)
Rules
  • Read the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me(or the comod) at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
  • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me or the comod, including role PMs. Do not play around with exploiting this rule.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderator or the comod, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
  • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • Do not edit the tags on the thread. This also applies if you are not playing the game.


Voting/Executions
  • This game is based on deadline execution. The player with the most votes at the time the deadline is reached is executed. In the case of a tie, the execution is randomly decided among the players with the most votes. Starting Day 2, majority execution is enabled, which means day will end early if at any time a player has more than half the amount of total votes on them. If majority execution is not reached, deadline execution occurs.
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: fdsa", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid. There is one exception to this; see below rule.
  • The characters "I" (capital i) and "l" (lowercase L) are considered the same character for the purpose of voting. That is, attempting to fakevote by substituting one of these characters in will not work.
  • You may vote for no execution to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Execution".
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be executed. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting for no execution, then there will be no execution. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person executed (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • At an <execute>-or-Lose situation, which is three town and two mafia, or two town and one mafia currently alive, votes are locked. This means that any attempt to unvote will be ignored, regardless of what the vote is.


Activity
  • Each day will be 504 hours (3 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 504 hours has occurred.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive an in-game prod.
  • To show you’re actually reading these please copy and send all bolded parts in the rules section into your role PM(you don’t have to send the vote examples or shorter bolded words/sections. there should be around 3).
  • If a player does not post in another 36-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
  • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless he/she posts before the moderator finds a replacement.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, SE’s up to one, and IC’s none. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (Nike100) am the Moderator of Game 163. Kbwuf is the co-moderator of Game 163.
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
  • Please do not post in those colors or in any shades of those colors.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules. The comod has second to last say, aka last say at that moment that they say, unless I have specified otherwise.
  • To confirm that you have read the rules till the end please post the word "Confirm" in bold in your first few posts.


Setup
This game will use the Backup6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Three of the roles will be generated randomly by picking a row or column from the matrix. Then one Mafia Goon and 5 Vanilla Townies are added to maintain a 2:7 mafia:town ratio. The six possible setups are:
1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Universal Backup, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Universal Backup, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons

Note that if applicable, a Mafia Roleblocker's action takes precedence over a Town Jailkeeper's action. The power of the Universal Backup cannot be roleblocked.

A Town Doctor is not able to self-protect.


Role PMs
Vanilla Townie Role PM wrote:
Hello __,
You are a regular Vanilla Townie, just a plain old townsperson. Your power lies in your right to speak and your vote.
Jailkeeper Role PM wrote:
Hello __,
You are the Jailkeeper, aka the Clothier. Your previous residence in the Dungeon allows you to know quite a bit about this place, enough to trap one person in it per night. Each night, you may reply to this role pm with the name of a player, who will then both become unable to perform night actions and be protected from any attacks.
Doctor Role PM wrote:
Hello __,
You are the Doctor, aka Holly the Nurse. Your healing abilities allow you to heal one player each night, whose name you must PM me before the start of day.
Cop Role PM wrote:
Hello __,
You are the Cop, aka Finn the Merchant with a hunter potion. Every night you may drink a hunter potion, which highlights all evil creatures within your vision. When night falls, you may send in the name of a player in this role PM, and at the end of the night you will be told whether this person is town or mafia.
Tracker Role PM wrote:
Hello __,
You are the Tracker, aka Nata the Dryad. Your fabulous camouflage abilities allow you to blend in very well with the surroundings each night. Thus, every night you may take the opportunity to stealthily track one player by sending their name in this role PM, whereupon you will be notified of who they visit as day begins.
Universal Backup Role PM wrote:
Hello __,
You are the Universal Backup, aka Knub the Goblin Tinkerer. After so many years of being trapped underground, you have little idea how to start anew, how to live again. But, you figure, with the proper inspiration, you could do great things for this town, to aid them in catching the evil bones. You will inherit the power of the first town power role to die.
Mafia Goon Role PM wrote:
Hello __,
You are a Mafia Goon, aka the Angry Bones. You hate the town with a burning passion, and have a strong desire to see it burn, but first the towns people must die. Each night you and your partner(goon/rber) may choose to kill one person in this QT.
Mafia Roleblocker Role PM wrote:
Hello __,
You are the Mafia Roleblocker, aka the Cursed Skull. Every night, as well as being able to choose who to kill with your partner(goon) in this QT, you will also be able to curse one player with the “cursed” effect by sending their username to me in this role PM. This will render them unable to perform actions for one night.


Alive (8)
  1. EulerNTM avanders
  2. shashwatchandra
  3. sudzoof
  4. e_is_cool++
  5. jeremylu+


Dead (1)
1. SupaHotSuKa, VT
2. JamesxGames etr217, JKer
3. Willowchicago, VT
4. summitwei, VT


Warnings (2)
shashwatchandra receives a warning for editing a post.
shashwatchandra receives a warning for posting during the night.


Do not post until this line is crossed out.

post_rendered:
The world of Terraria was quite peaceful, with of course the occasional slime each day, and zombies coming out at night. However, the Village was protected in full by doors built generously on all sides by the player, so the Village was rarely bothered by any unpleasurable company. The player was very careful to close the doors every day in order to keep the village safe, but one morning the doors were discovered to be open. The Guide was suspicious, but the player dismissed it as nothing. The next day one of the villagers found the player on the ground, stabbed with a bone through their chest. Only a bit later The Guide was discovered as well, badly wounded but somehow alive. As the Villagers gathered round, The Guide's eyes widened, and his mouth opened. "They're here, the bones..." Weakly, he raised his hand pointing around him Villagers. Then he fell.

The Moderator(Nike100) aka the player was stabbed to death.
The Co-Mod(Kbwuf) aka The Guide has died from blood loss.

You may now post. Day 1 starts at 10:10 AM on April 17, and ends at 10:10 AM on May 8.

About your sudzoof read in particular: I disagree with you that it would "make sense to [out cop] if you were a cop". Cop is an extremely important role and it doesn't make sense to claim it on Day 1, if you're actually cop. Overall I'm liking what I'm seeing from you so far, keep it up

notes as i reread
-shashwat omgused me in rvs
-willow attempted bandwagoning on sudzoof, "logically it would not be balanced if an slightly experienced player wasn't mafia"
-willow flips to James, then votes himself. "Anyways, we have no evidence, I don't see any scum tells, and I'm stumped. I know I'll be critiqued for scum tells like that chainsaw defense I made when I thought that the first day hadn't started yet. Or the time I forgot to bold. Eh, I don't care if I die. Just vote for me. I'm definitely mafia."
-willow unvotes himself after kbwuf warns from game throwing. (can kbwuf even do that?)
-shashwat bws on willow incorrectly, willow votes me for talking to him like mafia. I tell willow that I'm not and that shashwat bwing is bad, willow flips his vote to shashwat
-willow votes me because somehow I am buddying with him to draw attention away form my "true buddy". Also I just noticed the quote willow used wasn't even referring to my focus on willow, but rather shashwat. wat .-.
-sudzoof "him cop willow is mad plz lynch" elicits a shashwat response of asking if he can disclose his role. Low-key a pr claim.....
-sudzoof "id love to be able to sr [willow] for [having a teddyyt vibe] but ... it's probably NAI"
-side argument between e and supahotsuka here. e votes sudzoof. supa asks e why he would do this vote, and unvotes his own sudzoof vote, claiming the he will wait until sudzoof makes a slip/becomes more obvious. some sort of hypocrisy in supa revealed
-shashwat appears and votes etr217 who just replaced. sudzoof also votes
-etr votes willow for not liking his play, e puts a 3rd vote on etr.
-supa votes shashat and "really wants to get rid" of him. "really shouldn't play if he isn't interested in it."
-etr reads more, unvotes. e calls him out for backpedaling.
-sudzoof votes etr again "look at this easy scum read", etr asks why and he gives a bs reason "You stop fluffing to sr willow with no information, continue fluffing, and then proceed to say that willow could be towny, but you still sr him."
-supa no u's me......
-etr backs off from his argument, says me and sudz are confscum random guess
-e votes supahotsuka for having two poor reasons for scum telling. then in the same post says ear's posts are not good and that he doesn't like it, proceeds to vote etr.
-sudzoof says "oh cool I found you guilty n0" to avanders who replaces.
-avanders claims shashwat/etr is scummy for trying to hide something, referring to the disclose roles post earlier. he also says its suspicious that sudzoof would say he's cop and willow is mad because it would remove suspicion. Also avanders mentions that it would make sense to say it if he were cop (this makes no sense tho because cop doesn't have a report rn) and then also me because I am trying to keep suspicion off of me and my unknown partner (this doesn't make sense either)
-supa "so far avanders is looking fairly towny"
-e votes suka without reason, then says it is because supa is bandwagoning and being useless. (lowkey agree that the two points are true, not that they mean he is scum tho)
-etr asks for someone to tell him what to do (idk how to feel about this, can't see this being a town post ever tho)
-I explain something to willow, etr says we are therefore buddies, votes willow.
-avanders come back and votes sudzoof. sudzoof says avanders is bandwagoning and therefore its a scumtell, omgus votes.

EulerNTM avanders - slight townread. not enough enough posts but made an effort
JamesxGames etr217 - started strong as a replacement but backed off his argument.
